installCommand: pnpm install && mkdir -p bin && curl -L https://github.com/microsoft/docfind/releases/download/v0.5.1/docfind-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar -xz -C bin && chmod +x bin/docfind && export PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" && docfind --version
buildCommand: export PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" && pnpm packages:test && pnpm packages:build && pnpm build
